mapper.select:
select r.*, c.course_name, u.real_name as teacher_name from weekly_recipe r inner join child_profile cp on cp.parent_id = #{studentId} inner join activity_schedule s on s.class_id = cp.class_id and s.id = r.schedule_id left join activity_info c on r.course_id = c.id left join sys_user u on r.teacher_id = u.id where 1 = 1
and r.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by r.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into weekly_recipe (schedule_id, course_id, teacher_id, title, resource_type, resource_url, content_desc, status) values (#{scheduleId}, #{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{title}, #{resourceType}, #{resourceUrl}, #{contentDesc}, #{status})
